evidence.API_evidence: RESTful APIs documented with JSON format, OAuth 2.0 authentication, Account and Transaction API, multiple API products listed
evidence.SDK_evidence: Code examples in Go, Java, JavaScript for JWT generation and OAuth implementation
evidence.AI_evidence: No AI models, agents, or AI-specific tools found
evidence.language_evidence: All content in English, no language switcher found

coding_notes: API=1 based on extensive API documentation including Account and Transaction API, Card on-demand APIs, and OAuth endpoints. METH=2 due to GET and POST methods documented in OAuth flows. SDK=1 from code examples in multiple languages. STAN=1 for OAuth 2.0 and OpenID Connect standards. ROLE=1 due to role-based access control system with Owner/Admin/Developer roles. DATA=1 from Privacy Statement and Portal Terms of Use governing data usage. MON=1 from revenue sharing program for Card on-demand Partners. OPEN=1 as registration appears to be free self-service (Sign Up button available).
